name: Yi Pin Mala Tang
tagline: Kapahulu's pick-your-own malatang shop — choose your ingredients, pick your spice level, and get a customized bowl of numbing-spicy soup.
mustOrder: build your own bowl — pick proteins, veggies, noodles, and spice level
add extra chili oil and Sichuan peppercorn
pair with a cold drink — you'll need it
talkStory: Malatang is China's customizable street food soup — you pick your raw ingredients from a display (meat, tofu, vegetables, mushrooms, noodles), choose your spice level, and it's all cooked together in a spicy numbing broth. Yi Pin on Kapahulu is the best version on Oahu. 4.6 stars, friendly owner, open late (until 11:30pm most nights). Different from hot pot because someone else cooks it for you. A great solo meal or late-night option after a Kapahulu dinner crawl.
